data.title: MONY Group Updates Sharesave Scheme Block Listing Balance
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

An announcement from Moneysupermarket.com ( (GB:MONY) ) is now available.

MONY Group PLC reported its latest bi-annual block listing return for the Moneysupermarket.com Group PLC Sharesave Scheme, covering the period from 1 January to 30 June 2026. During this period, 73,269 shares were issued or allotted under the scheme, reducing the balance of unallotted securities from 489,321 to 416,052, indicating continued employee participation in the company’s share-based incentive program.

The updated figures highlight that no additional increases were made to the overall block listing authority in the period, suggesting the current scheme capacity remains sufficient for ongoing needs. The changes in the unallotted balance may reflect steady uptake of the Sharesave Scheme by eligible employees, which can support staff retention and alignment with shareholder interests without materially altering the company’s capital structure at this stage.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:MONY) stock is a Buy
with a £2.15 price target.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MONY is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by strong financial performance (profitability, low leverage, and robust free cash flow) and attractive valuation (low P/E and high dividend yield). These positives are partly offset by weak technicals, with the stock trading below key moving averages and showing bearish momentum.

To see Spark’s full report on MONY stock,
click here.

More about Moneysupermarket.com

Moneysupermarket.com, part of MONY Group PLC, operates in the financial services comparison industry, offering online platforms that help consumers compare and select products such as insurance, loans, and other personal finance services. The company focuses on the U.K. market, leveraging technology and data to connect customers with a wide range of financial providers and deals.

data.title: Junshi Biosciences Licenses Autoimmune Antibody Roconkibart to Fosun Wanbang for Greater China
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Shanghai Junshi Biosciences Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:1877) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Shanghai Junshi Biosciences has signed a licensing agreement with Fosun Wanbang, a subsidiary of Fosun Pharma, granting it exclusive rights to develop, register and commercialize the anti-IL-17A monoclonal antibody roconkibart (JS005) in Greater China, along with co-exclusive manufacturing rights. The deal includes an upfront payment of RMB215 million, up to RMB1.125 billion in development and sales milestones, and double-digit tiered royalties, strengthening Junshi’s monetization of its pipeline while leveraging Fosun’s commercial infrastructure.

The agreement secures long-term revenue potential for Junshi through extended royalty terms tied to patent and regulatory exclusivity, underscoring confidence in roconkibart’s prospects in autoimmune diseases such as psoriasis and ankylosing spondylitis. Roconkibart has demonstrated strong phase III efficacy and safety in moderate to severe psoriasis, and its NDA for adult plaque psoriasis has been accepted by China’s National Medical Products Administration, positioning the product as a potential new biologic competitor in the autoimmune segment and enhancing Junshi’s standing in the domestic biologics market.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1877) stock is a Hold
with a HK$34.70 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Shanghai Junshi Biosciences Co., Ltd. Class H stock,
see the HK:1877 Stock Forecast page.

More about Shanghai Junshi Biosciences Co., Ltd. Class H

Shanghai Junshi Biosciences Co., Ltd. is a China-based biopharmaceutical company focused on developing innovative antibody therapies, with a portfolio targeting autoimmune and oncology indications. The company concentrates on the Greater China market, leveraging partnerships with major domestic pharmaceutical groups to advance late-stage biologics and expand commercial reach.

Average Trading Volume: 4,176,342

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$34.22B

data.title: Quantum Helium Wins Approval for 100-to-1 Share Consolidation
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Mosman Oil and Gas ( (GB:QHE) ) just unveiled an update.

Quantum Helium Limited has secured shareholder approval for a 100-to-1 share consolidation at its Extraordinary General Meeting, with 93% of votes cast in favour. The move will reduce the company’s issued share capital from nearly 50 billion to about 500 million ordinary shares, streamlining its capital structure and potentially improving the trading profile of its stock on AIM.

The consolidation becomes effective on 3 July 2026, with trading in the new consolidated shares on AIM scheduled to commence that morning and replacement share certificates due by mid-July. Following implementation, Quantum will have 499,853,967 ordinary shares in issue, each carrying one voting right, setting a new baseline for shareholders to calculate and report any changes in notifiable interests under the company’s articles.

Spark’s Take on QHE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, QHE is a Neutral.

The score is primarily weighed down by weak financial performance (deep losses, volatile revenue, and accelerating cash burn) and bearish technicals (downtrend with negative MACD). A debt-free balance sheet provides some stability, but valuation support is limited given a non-meaningful P/E and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on QHE stock,
click here.

More about Mosman Oil and Gas

Quantum Helium Limited is a helium, hydrogen and hydrocarbon exploration, development and production company with projects in the US and Australia. The company aims to generate operating cash flow with development upside while advancing its exploration portfolio, including several US projects and royalty interests in Australia.

Ashoka Whiteoak Emerging Markets Trust Plc ( (GB:AWEM) ) just unveiled an update.

Ashoka WhiteOak Emerging Markets Trust plc reported that non-executive director Howard Pearce purchased 5,000 ordinary shares in the company at 189.196 pence per share on 30 June 2026. Following this transaction, Pearce’s total holding has increased to 25,000 ordinary shares, representing about 0.06% of the company’s issued share capital, signalling additional board-level confidence in the trust’s prospects and aligning his interests further with shareholders.

The transaction was conducted on the London Stock Exchange and disclosed in accordance with UK Market Abuse Regulation requirements. This purchase underscores regulatory transparency and may be viewed positively by investors as an indication of insider support for the trust’s current strategy and positioning in emerging markets.

data.title: Severn Trent grants new long-term incentive share awards to senior managers
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

The latest announcement is out from Severn Trent ( (GB:SVT) ).

Severn Trent has granted awards over 224,703 ordinary shares under its 2021 Long Term Incentive Plan, including 90,000 shares allocated to directors and persons discharging managerial responsibilities. The awards, which carry no upfront cost and are based on an average recent share price, are scheduled to vest in July 2029 subject to performance conditions and continued service.

The company’s remuneration committee retains discretion to adjust vesting outcomes, including for windfall gains or where results are not seen as a fair reflection of overall performance, and may reduce awards or claw back shares if necessary. The move underscores Severn Trent’s continued use of performance-linked equity incentives to align senior management with long-term financial and operational goals in line with its shareholder-approved pay policy.

data.title: Geely edges up first-half sales as exports and Zeekr surge
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Geely Automobile Holdings ( (HK:0175) ) has shared an announcement.

Geely Automobile reported unaudited total sales of 240,799 vehicles in June 2026, a 2% year-on-year increase, bringing first-half sales to 1,422,958 units, up 1% from a year earlier. Brand performance was mixed, with core Geely-branded volumes down, Lynk & Co declining, but Zeekr more than doubling sales and Galaxy models growing in June despite a weaker year-to-date tally.

The product mix continues to shift, as June sales of battery electric vehicles rose 22% while plug-in hybrids surged 55%, though BEVs remained lower year-to-date and PHEVs sharply higher. Exports more than doubled in June and year-to-date, underscoring Geely’s expanding international reach, while associate brand Proton posted strong double‑digit growth, highlighting resilience in overseas operations despite uneven performance across segments.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0175) stock is a Buy
with a HK$36.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Geely Automobile Holdings stock,
see the HK:0175 Stock Forecast page.

More about Geely Automobile Holdings

Geely Automobile Holdings is a Chinese automotive manufacturer listed in Hong Kong, producing a range of passenger vehicles under brands including Geely, Galaxy, Lynk & Co and Zeekr. The group focuses on internal combustion, battery electric and plug-in hybrid models, with a growing export footprint across markets outside mainland China.

Average Trading Volume: 69,234,775

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$182.9B

The latest announcement is out from Aurora Investment Trust PLC ( (GB:ARR) ).

Aurora UK Alpha plc has confirmed that as of 30 June 2026 its issued share capital consisted of 114,572,742 ordinary shares of 25p, with 7,093,508 of these held in treasury and not carrying voting rights. This leaves a total of 107,479,234 voting rights, a key reference figure that shareholders must use to assess whether they are obliged to disclose new or altered holdings under UK transparency rules.

The announcement clarifies Aurora UK Alpha’s current capital and voting structure, offering investors and regulators a clear denominator for calculating significant shareholdings. By confirming the volume of treasury shares and effective voting rights, the company supports compliance with disclosure obligations and enhances transparency in its ownership structure for all market participants.

data.title: Kokuyo to Sell Former Osaka Head Office to Boost Asset Efficiency
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Kokuyo Co ( (JP:7984) ) has provided an update.

Kokuyo Co., Ltd. has decided to transfer its former Osaka head office and an adjacent guest house site as part of a broader effort to optimize asset efficiency following its recent head office relocation. The properties, located in Higashinari-ku, Osaka City, are being sold to a domestic operating company, with Kokuyo declining to disclose the buyer’s identity while confirming no related-party relationship.

The transaction involves assets with a combined book value of ¥1,307 million and an agreed sale price of ¥5,772 million, generating an estimated gain of ¥4,282 million after associated costs. Kokuyo plans to recognize approximately ¥753 million in gains in the year ending December 2026 from the guest house lot and about ¥3,529 million in the year ending December 2027 from the former main building, and it expects the overall impact on consolidated financial results to be immaterial, underscoring a focus on balance-sheet efficiency rather than transformative earnings growth.

More about Kokuyo Co

Kokuyo Co., Ltd. is a Japanese company listed on the TSE Prime that operates in the office supplies and furniture sector, providing stationery, office furniture, and related services to corporate and individual customers. The company maintains a significant presence in Japan, including major facilities in Osaka, and focuses on efficient asset utilization and stable financial management to support its core operations.

Average Trading Volume: 1,039,796

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen341.8B

Persimmon ( (GB:PSN) ) has provided an announcement.

Persimmon Plc has issued and admitted to trading 48,838 new ordinary shares of 10p each during June 2026 to satisfy vested awards under its employee share schemes. Following this issuance, the total number of Persimmon ordinary shares admitted to trading stands at 321,240,932, with the new shares fully fungible with existing stock.

The additional shares were issued under existing block admissions related to the company’s 2017 Performance Share Plan, with admissions occurring on various dates throughout June. The move reflects ongoing use of equity-based incentives for employees, slightly diluting existing shareholders while supporting Persimmon’s long-term remuneration and retention strategy.

data.description:

The latest update is out from OXIDE Corp. ( (JP:6521) ).

OXIDE Corporation reported the June 2026 exercise status of its 6th series stock acquisition rights, with 10 units exercised resulting in the issuance of 10,000 new shares during the month. Following these exercises, unexercised stock acquisition rights for the 6th series decreased to 527 units, representing 527,000 potential shares.

As of the end of June 2026, the company had 11,608,113 issued shares excluding dilutive securities and 527,000 dilutive shares tied to remaining stock options. If all such options are exercised, total shares outstanding would rise to 12,135,113, indicating ongoing potential equity dilution for existing shareholders from stock-based incentives.
